programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons
programme.sub-title: Extra Love: Main Character at the Bachelorette Party
programme.desc: The family takes on a spicy challenge and spill their secrets. At Liz's bachelorette brunch, Liz ends up in handcuffs when one surprise guest arrives. Later, the bride and groom-to-be attend a dance class but realize they're completely out of sync.

programme.desc: Mitch and Cam try to save an old tree in the park; Jay takes Manny to a kid's Olympics-themed birthday party; Gloria and Claire have an eventful shopping trip.

programme.desc: When Manny and Luke's Little League team makes it to the playoffs, Claire and Cameron search for a field to use; Gloria uses a microphone to sing to the baby.

programme.desc: Jay and the family plan to celebrate New Year's together at a hotel in Palm Springs, but the hotel doesn't meet their expectations; Alex and Haley are faced with challenges as they try to watch the kids back at home.

programme.desc: Gloria and Jay try to make Manny's 14th birthday extra special by planning a surprise party; Haley starts hanging out with a much older guy.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Tameru is a drag queen, but he has a myriad of cysts that are the real drag; Devon has uneven skin she thinks may be the result of a hysterectomy a decade ago; Amy has large growths all over her head that make her look like a "hot mess.".

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Debra has a large, brain-like growth on the side of her head that feels like a sponge, has crevices and emits an odor; Dusten is a cowboy looking to remove the painful lump on his knee; Ramiro has a bump on his jaw that has already been removed once.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Bob suffers from mysterious open-wound sores all over his body; Virginia's stress-ball-sized lump is such a pain in her neck that she can't wait to have it removed; Ted suffers from flaking, itchy, stucco-like skin and has had no luck finding a cure.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: John lost his sight at a young age and soon after began growing lumps on his body. Lynette has hundreds of pebble-sized bumps all over her arms, chest and belly. Gabe cannot imagine going to college with the unsightly mole on the back of his head.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Johnnie's crippling psoriasis keeps him from spending time with his daughter; Aimee has a mohawk of cysts on her head; Edith's face markings and itchy skin condition turn out to be more than she expected.

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: Jonathan had his dream job, and he ate himself out of it; once an EMT first responder, he rarely leaves the room; his wife works full time to pay their bills; Jonathan must break the cycle of eating if he wants to keep his wife and his life.

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: Deshaun takes being protective of his mom to the next level; he's over 700 pounds and won't leave his mother's apartment; Dr. Now and Dr. Paradise must get him to leave the bedroom.

programme.sub-title: Toe Be Or Not Toe Be

programme.title: The Bad Foot Clinic
programme.desc: Podiatrist Marion solves the mystery of Jonathan's twisted toes, gets marathon runner Robert's feet fit for his next race and helps a drag queen back into heels.

programme.title: One Day in My Body
programme.desc: At just 18 years old, Loren was involved in a catastrophic forklift accident; to save his life, doctors cut him in half; Sofia was an active 29-year-old when her heart went into end-stage failure; now she must be plugged-in to stay alive.

programme.title: One Day in My Body
programme.desc: Following people whose bodies force them to navigate life differently, capturing defining moments with unfiltered access to their world.

programme.title: The Bad Foot Clinic
programme.desc: Podiatrist Marion treats Elaine who suffered childhood teasing due to her webbed feet; she hopes surgery can put an end to 65 years of misery.

programme.title: The Bad Foot Clinic
programme.desc: Sharon's smelly feet make her and her husband's lives a misery; however, strange smells, verrucae and hooked toes are all in a day's work for Marion.

programme.title: The Jennifer Hudson Show
programme.desc: Jennifer sits down for an exclusive interview with the cast of "Michael" -- Colman Domingo, Jaafar Jackson and Juliano Valdi -- to discuss the highly anticipated film; Jennifer welcomes Renee Watson and Maile Bellosi -- what began as a shared teaching career became an extraordinary act of love when Renee donated a kidney to her longtime friend Maile, giving her renewed life and hope for the future.

programme.desc: When the lead in the school's production of "Phantom of the Opera" gets sick, Manny is willing to do anything to land the lead; Phil and Jay wind up in a golf-off with Mitch and Pepper; Gloria and Alex visit a psychic.

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.sub-title: The Last Time I Saw My Mother, I Was 5 Years Old
programme.desc: A man searches for his birth mother, whose disappearance when he was 5 years old has haunted him for his entire life; a woman hoping to meet a member of her biological family faces certain realities about her true past.

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.sub-title: If I'd Only Known About Her
programme.desc: A woman longs to meet her birth father, a man she credits for saving her life during a difficult childhood, even though they never met; a desperate man hopes Lisa can end a 57-year search for his infant sister, who he never stopped loving.

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.sub-title: She Chose Another Person Over Her Child

programme.sub-title: Between the Sheets: The Act of Cobwebbing
